meaning: n.旗手,平交道看守,信号旗手
examples: Besides, Varyag is just a beautiful ship and a real flagman of the Fleet.
The four ships are surrounded by the hospital ship Irtysh and flagman of the Pacific Fleet, Varyag cruiser.
Last month a young man called Ahmed al-Shahat, dubbed "the flagman", was hailed as a national hero for scaling the Israeli building and replacing the Star of David with a Palestinian banner.
